item.title: NASA boss blasts Boeing, space agency managers for botched Starliner astronaut flight
item.description: NASA's new boss is blasting Boeing and the space agency for Starliner's botched flight that left two astronauts stuck at the International Space Stati...

item.title: HUD proposes rule that would force noncitizens from public housing
item.description: The U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development is proposing a rule that would limit public housing mostly to citizens, which advocates fear coul...

item.title: US pays about $160 million of the nearly $4 billion it owes the United Nations
item.description: The United Nations says the United States has paid about $160 million of the nearly $4 billion it owes the world body

item.title: Slavery exhibit removed by Trump administration is returning to Independence Mall
item.description: Workers are restoring an exhibit depicting the history of the nine people once enslaved in Philadelphia amid a legal fight between the city and the Tr...
